intro: Azadirachta indica salve, also known as neem salve, is a topical treatment made from the oil of the neem tree. This salve has been traditionally used to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. When applied topically, the salve can help to calm acne, eczema, and other skin conditions, while also providing a natural barrier against environmental stressors.
